[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000011 3
1 1000010 2
2 1111110 6
3 1111111 a
4 0011110 4
5 0111011 5
6 0010110 3
7 0101000 2

01 0010100 2
12 0000001 1
23 0000000 a
34 0000000 a
45 0110111 5
56 0000000 a
67 0101000 2 match 7
70 0000000 a

71 0010100 2
